name: Invoke-Obfuscation Via Use Clip - Security
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nikita Nazarov, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Invoke-Obfuscation Via Use Clip - Security
SIGMA Description: Detects Obfuscated Powershell via use Clip.exe in Scripts

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%(clipboard|i%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Invoke-Obfuscation Via Use Clip - Security on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=4697 AND LOWER("Service Filename") LIKE '%(clipboard|i%' AQL filter query
